description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile wooden cabinet with a natural light oak finish, featuring clean, modern lines and a minimalist design. The front face displays two large, flat doors with a subtle vertical seam between them, suggesting a two-compartment storage system. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The rear view reveals a recessed central cutout, likely for cable management or wall mounting, and the back panels are a contrasting light gray, possibly made of a different material. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or wood composite, with metal fasteners visible on the back. There are no visible handles or knobs, indicating a push-to-open mechanism or touch-latch system.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with two large front doors and a flat top, finished in light oak with a minimalist design. The back features a recessed cutout and contrasting gray panels.
description_view_0: The end view shows a plain, flat wooden side with a light oak finish and no visible features.
description_view_1: The front view displays two large, flat doors with a vertical seam, forming the main access to the cabinet's storage compartments.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the first, showing a plain, flat wooden side with no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals two large gray panels, a central recessed cutout, and visible metal fasteners, indicating the back of the cabinet.
